query_title: Love, Chunibyo & Other Delusions! Take On Me

recommendations.title: Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dreaming Girl
recommendations.overview: In Fujisawa, Sakuta Azusagawa is in his second year of high school. Blissful days with his girlfriend and upperclassman, Mai Sakurajima, are interrupted by the appearance of his first crush, Shoko Makinohara.

recommendations.title: Flying Colors
recommendations.overview: A high school girl, Sayaka Kudō was the bottom of the class. After a year, she improved her deviation value from 30 to 70, then passed Keio University that is considered one of the most difficult to enter in Japan.

recommendations.title: Monsters 103 Mercies Dragon Damnation
recommendations.overview: A samurai's path leads him to a young waitress whose hometown was destroyed by a dragon. He doesn't want any trouble — but it finds them anyway.

recommendations.title: Suzume
recommendations.overview: Suzume, 17, lost her mother as a little girl. On her way to school, she meets a mysterious young man. But her curiosity unleashes a calamity that endangers the entire population of Japan, and so Suzume embarks on a journey to set things right.

recommendations.title: Gnome Alone
recommendations.overview: When Chloe discovers that her new home's garden gnomes are not what they seem, she must decide between the pursuit of a desired high school life and taking up the fight against the Troggs.

recommendations.title: Lou
recommendations.overview: A Pixar short about a lost-and-found box and the unseen monster within.

recommendations.title: Summer Days with Coo
recommendations.genres: Animation, Fantasy, Comedy, Romance, Drama, Family
recommendations.overview: A small, lone Kappa miraculously survives over 200 years into modern day Japan, when he is found by young Koichi. Coo, who is secretly adopted by Koichi's family, searches with his new human friend for unpopulated places in hopes of finding any remai

recommendations.title: I Got Life!
recommendations.overview: Aurore has separated, just lost her job, and learns that she is going to be a grandmother.

recommendations.title: Blood: The Last Vampire
recommendations.overview: In Japan, the vampire-hunter Saya, who is a powerful original, is sent by her liaison with the government, David, posed as a teenage student to the Yokota High School on the eve of Halloween to hunt down vampires. Saya asks David to give a new katana

recommendations.title: Daddy, I'm a Zombie
recommendations.overview: The misadventures of a teenager girl in her new life as zombie.
